MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donald Field for Alexander Chan (Administrator).

Mr. Field stated that he is not aware of any objections. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Distribution Rights (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
